_note: Scene proposal built from proposer/observations.md (24-object explore log) in the centered standpoint frame. Anchors carry full geometry verified with shot.py --box (see PROPOSAL_NOTES.md). Non-anchors carry size + support + constraints only; the composer solves their positions. Frame: origin=standpoint, North=-z, East=+x, South=+z, West=-x, up=+y, floor y=-3.2. Units approx meters. Coords are best-effort estimates from a non-metric 3DGS scene; N-wall numbers are softer (unscanned capture void).

scene.style: warm, light-wood floor, cream walls with kids' wall decals; lots of built-in white cabinetry; soft toy-filled play zones

objects.description: wooden staircase with turned balusters and handrail, treads rising west->east, white-painted closed stringer/skirt below; dominant North-wall structure
full-height white 4-panel under-stair closet door with lever handle; light switch on wall beside it
low white built-in cabinetry filling the triangular under-stair void, beneath the rising treads
tall floor-to-near-ceiling white built-in wardrobe: two upper cabinet doors, two lower doors/drawers, brushed handles; biggest mass on the East wall
built-in: 4-5 open upper shelves packed with books/binders/files over a lower cabinet with two doors; SE corner directly behind desk's right end
wooden desk against the south wall with a dark monitor, keyboard, cable bundle below and a small chair tucked under; faces North into the room
white slanted-front tiered kids' picture-book display rack, ~4 rows, full of children's books; SW corner
large beige curtain covering a West-wall recess (likely a window or storage niche)
dark computer monitor standing on the desk, facing into the room
dark framed print of a steam train, upper West wall
wall-mounted wooden bead/alphabet train abacus toy, low on the West wall
child's red/blue ride-on push car on the floor near the West wall / NW
blue-seat baby stroller parked in front of the East wardrobe
long yellow peanut-shaped beanbag on the bare floor in front of the stairs
round red pouf/beanbag sitting on the SW alphabet foam mat
two stuffed lion toys at the SW edge of the foam mat
grey plush elephant/whale toy on the floor by the striped rug near the wardrobe base
small light-wood child table with little chairs, West / SW corner
assorted play kitchen / cash-register role-play toys clustered at the kids' table
multicolor striped runner rug (pink/black/blue/red) running N-S along the East/center side
interlocking colored foam alphabet puzzle mat filling the SW floor; main play zone
small cars, wooden toys and blocks strewn across the central floor / rug
decorative kids' wall decals (rocket on W wall, animals/balloons on E & S walls)
light wood plank flooring throughout, partly covered by the two rugs/mats
